name: Sanger
description: AI-assisted genomics and biotech research application. Helps researchers analyze sequencing data, identify variants, generate hypotheses from literature, and write structured research summaries.
current_state: Literature search and summarization module working. Variant annotation pipeline in development. No wet-lab integration yet. Data privacy compliance review pending.
target_users: Pharmaceutical R&D teams in early discovery
known_issues: Variant annotation limited to known databases (no novel variant support)
Literature search limited to PubMed (no preprint servers yet)
Large dataset performance issues (>10GB VCF files)
next_priorities: Novel variant interpretation via AI reasoning
Performance optimization for large VCF files
target_market: Life sciences research — academic and biotech
